title: Nether Star Waystone Craft
description: Nether Star Waystone Craft is an addon for KawaMood's Waystones that modifies the waystone recipes to make them crafted with a Nether Star, and one less material block.
body:
Nether Star Waystone Craft is an addon for [KawaMood's Waystones](https://modrinth.com/datapack/waystones-data-pack) that modifies the waystone recipes to make them more expensive, costing a nether star.

<details>
<summary>Recipes of all the styles of waystones</summary>

![Recipes of all the styles of waystones](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f09b20f2fadd4e07847003aaaa79a4f4c394d18.gif)

</details>
